ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Yiguan (ŚłęŚģúŚģė). Regarded as the finest exponent of the ‚ÄúClerical style‚ÄĚ of calligraphy, turned it into a street act. Shi Yiguan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Yuan Shu.
